requirement_topic.en: Market Access — BOBS Import Permit / BOS Mark and In-Country Importer
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——BOBS进口许可/BOS标志与本地进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——BOBS進口許可/BOS標誌與本地進口商

summary.en: Botswana is landlocked, with imports typically routed through the ports of Durban （South Africa） or Walvis Bay （Namibia） and then overland. Market access for regulated goods runs through the Botswana Bureau of Standards （BOBS）, which administers import inspection and the BOS conformity mark / import-permit system for products covered by a compulsory standards specification. There is no foreign self-declaration pathway equivalent to an EU Authorised Representative; in practice an in-country importer / local entity is needed to clear customs, hold conformity documentation, and interface with BOBS and the Botswana Unified Revenue Service （BURS）. Exporters should verify with BOBS whether their specific lithium battery or power bank is on a compulsory specification list and what import mark/permit applies.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳为内陆国，进口通常经德班（南非）或鲸湾港（纳米比亚）口岸再陆运。受管制商品的市场准入通过博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）进行，由其负责进口检验及针对强制标准规范覆盖产品的BOS合格标志/进口许可制度。不存在等同于欧盟授权代表的境外自我声明路径；实务上需要本地进口商/当地实体来清关、保存合格文件，并与BOBS及博茨瓦纳统一税务局（BURS）对接。出口商应向BOBS核实其具体锂电池或移动电源是否在强制规范清单上，以及适用何种进口标志/许可。
summary.zht: 波札那為內陸國，進口通常經德班（南非）或鯨灣港（納米比亞）口岸再陸運。受管制商品的市場准入透過波札那標準局（BOBS）進行，由其負責進口檢驗及針對強制標準規範覆蓋產品的BOS合格標誌/進口許可制度。不存在等同於歐盟授權代表的境外自我聲明路徑；實務上需要本地進口商/當地實體來清關、保存合格文件，並與BOBS及波札那統一稅務局（BURS）對接。出口商應向BOBS核實其具體鋰電池或行動電源是否在強制規範清單上，以及適用何種進口標誌/許可。

standards_or_laws: Standards Act (Botswana) — BOBS import inspection and BOS conformity mark / import-permit system
Botswana Unified Revenue Service (BURS) — customs clearance and import controls
In-country importer / local entity required (no foreign self-declaration equivalent to an EU Authorised Representative)

summary.en: For the Chinese domestic market there is no concept of a Botswana import mark or local importer; products are placed on the market by the Chinese manufacturer/seller under CCC （where catalogue-listed） and GB standards, cleared by China Customs （GACC）. A Chinese exporter cannot self-declare into Botswana from abroad and has no Chinese-side document that substitutes for BOBS conformity, the BOS import mark, or a Botswana in-country importer.
summary.zh: 就中国国内市场而言，不存在博茨瓦纳进口标志或本地进口商的概念；产品由中国制造商/销售方依CCC（目录内）及GB标准投放市场，并由中国海关（GACC）清关。中国出口商无法从境外自我声明进入博茨瓦纳，也没有可替代BOBS合格评定、BOS进口标志或博茨瓦纳本地进口商的中方文件。
summary.zht: 就中國國內市場而言，不存在波札那進口標誌或本地進口商的概念；產品由中國製造商/銷售方依CCC（目錄內）及GB標準投放市場，並由中國海關（GACC）清關。中國出口商無法從境外自我聲明進入波札那，也沒有可替代BOBS合格評定、BOS進口標誌或波札那本地進口商的中方文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC + GB standards — China domestic market placement (no Botswana import-mark concept)
GACC (General Administration of Customs of China) — export clearance

gap.en: Key gaps: (1) Botswana is landlocked — logistics route via Durban or Walvis Bay and overland, with the lithium-battery transport rules in the transport row applying along the chain; (2) no foreign self-declaration — an in-country importer / local entity is needed to clear customs and hold conformity documents; (3) where the product is on a BOBS compulsory specification, the BOS import mark / import permit and supporting test reports are required at import; (4) Chinese CCC/GB documentation does not substitute for BOBS conformity. Exporters should confirm scope and the exact import-permit route with BOBS and appoint a local importer early.
gap.zh: 主要差距：（1）博茨瓦纳为内陆国——物流经德班或鲸湾港再陆运，运输行所述锂电池运输规则沿链条适用；（2）无境外自我声明——需本地进口商/当地实体清关并保存合格文件；（3）产品属BOBS强制规范时，进口时需BOS进口标志/进口许可及配套检测报告；（4）中国CCC/GB文件不能替代BOBS合格评定。出口商应向BOBS确认范围及具体进口许可路径，并尽早指定本地进口商。
gap.zht: 主要差距：（1）波札那為內陸國——物流經德班或鯨灣港再陸運，運輸行所述鋰電池運輸規則沿鏈條適用；（2）無境外自我聲明——需本地進口商/當地實體清關並保存合格文件；（3）產品屬BOBS強制規範時，進口時需BOS進口標誌/進口許可及配套檢測報告；（4）中國CCC/GB文件不能替代BOBS合格評定。出口商應向BOBS確認範圍及具體進口許可路徑，並盡早指定本地進口商。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — BOBS import inspection / BOS import mark for products under a compulsory specification; in-country importer required for customs clearance and document holding
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable to Botswana — China-side CCC/GB market placement and GACC clearance carry no Botswana legal effect

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Botswana market access for regulated lithium batteries and power banks runs through BOBS import inspection / the BOS import mark where the product is in scope, plus an in-country importer to clear customs (typically via Durban or Walvis Bay) and hold conformity documents. There is no foreign self-declaration route, and Chinese CCC/GB paperwork does not complete a Botswana file. Exporters should confirm scope with BOBS and appoint a local importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 受管制锂电池和移动电源的博茨瓦纳市场准入，在产品属管制范围时通过BOBS进口检验/BOS进口标志进行，并需本地进口商清关（通常经德班或鲸湾港）并保存合格文件。不存在境外自我声明路径，中国CCC/GB文件不能完成博茨瓦纳文件。出口商应向BOBS确认范围并指定本地进口商。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 受管制鋰電池和行動電源的波札那市場准入，在產品屬管制範圍時透過BOBS進口檢驗/BOS進口標誌進行，並需本地進口商清關（通常經德班或鯨灣港）並保存合格文件。不存在境外自我聲明路徑，中國CCC/GB文件不能完成波札那文件。出口商應向BOBS確認範圍並指定本地進口商。
